2024-25 Saint Joseph's Hawks Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 22-13 (11-7, 5th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Billy Lange

PS/G: 75.1 (141st of 364)

PA/G: 68.6 (72nd of 364)

SRS: 7.28 (86th of 364)

SOS: 0.85 (116th of 364)

ORtg: 109.0 (136th of 364)

DRtg: 99.7 (58th of 364)
